doc: Polyphonic playable rig (8 voices) with a feedback delay in the master path. Each voice is a hosted `default-voice` sub-patch; the voicer sums them and the delay echoes the mix. Send /voicer/notes [midi, gate] to play (e.g. [69.0, 1.0] note-on A4, [69.0, 0.0] note-off; several = a chord). Tweak the echo live over OSC: /delay/time (seconds), /delay/feedback (0..0.95), /delay/mix (dry/wet 0..1).

nodes.doc: Hosts 8 default-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio.
Feedback echo on the master mix.
